name: Claude Agent
description: ACP wrapper for Anthropic's Claude
installCommand:
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
npm install -g --prefix "$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code
(mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/share/corporation/acp/npm/claude-acp" "$HOME/.local/bin"
npm install -g --prefix "$HOME/.local/share/corporation/acp/npm/claude-acp" '@zed-industries/claude-agent-acp@0.21.0') >/tmp/corporation-acp-claude-acp.log 2>&1 &
printf "Preparing Claude Agent ACP runtime in the background. Logs: /tmp/corporation-acp-claude-acp.log\n"

name: Codex CLI
description: ACP adapter for OpenAI's coding assistant
acpInstallCommand:
mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin"
tmp_dir="$(mktemp -d)"
install_dir="$HOME/.local/share/corporation/acp/codex-acp/0.9.5"
cleanup() { rm -rf "$tmp_dir"; }
trap cleanup EXIT
rm -rf "$install_dir"
mkdir -p "$install_dir" "$tmp_dir/unpack"
curl -fsSL 'https://github.com/zed-industries/codex-acp/releases/download/v0.9.5/codex-acp-0.9.5-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz' -o "$tmp_dir/archive"
tar -xzf "$tmp_dir/archive" -C "$tmp_dir/unpack"
cp -R "$tmp_dir/unpack"/. "$install_dir"/
chmod +x "$install_dir/codex-acp"
installCommand:
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
npm install -g --prefix "$HOME/.local" @openai/codex
(mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin"
tmp_dir="$(mktemp -d)"
install_dir="$HOME/.local/share/corporation/acp/codex-acp/0.9.5"
cleanup() { rm -rf "$tmp_dir"; }
trap cleanup EXIT
rm -rf "$install_dir"
mkdir -p "$install_dir" "$tmp_dir/unpack"
curl -fsSL 'https://github.com/zed-industries/codex-acp/releases/download/v0.9.5/codex-acp-0.9.5-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz' -o "$tmp_dir/archive"
tar -xzf "$tmp_dir/archive" -C "$tmp_dir/unpack"
cp -R "$tmp_dir/unpack"/. "$install_dir"/
chmod +x "$install_dir/codex-acp") >/tmp/corporation-acp-codex-acp.log 2>&1 &
printf "Preparing Codex CLI ACP runtime in the background. Logs: /tmp/corporation-acp-codex-acp.log\n"
